name: DAST Web Proxy (ZAP)
description: Dynamic application security testing via OWASP ZAP Docker container.
long_description:
Runs OWASP ZAP in a Docker container to perform automated DAST scans against web applications. Supports full spidering, active scanning, and AJAX crawling for JavaScript-heavy apps. Generates HTML and JSON reports with categorized findings.

Requires Docker to be installed on the host machine.

fields.label: Target URL

validation.message: Must be a valid HTTP(S) URL

fields.help: The full URL (including scheme) of the web application to scan.

safety.consent_message: DAST payload injection should only run in authorized environments. Active scanning may disrupt target services.
